title: The Office of Theresa May - Contact
meta_description: Contact information for The Rt Hon Theresa May MP, former Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.
text_excerpt: The Office of Theresa May - Contact 0 Skip to Content The Office of Theresa May Home About Biography Contact Open Menu Close Menu The Office of Theresa May Home About Biography Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home About Biography Contact Contact Us If you would like to contact Theresa May in her capacity as the former UK Prime Minister or former Member of Parliament, please complete the form on this page . Please note that, due to the volume of public correspondence we receive, it is not always possible for Theresa to reply to every message personally.
